zh.Eastham, Barnstable, Plymouth Colony, Br: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼巴恩斯塔波易亞斯坦
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sarah Freeman於1682年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼巴恩斯塔波易亞斯坦時，她的父親Edmond Freeman25歲，母親Sarah Mayo22歲。她於1701年5月22日與Benjamin Higgins II在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼巴恩斯塔波易亞斯坦結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和7個女兒的父母。她去世於1743年1月21日在她的家鄉享年61歲，埋葬在美國麻薩諸塞州巴恩斯塔波易亞斯坦可福 波英 格洛德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sarah Freeman于1682年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼巴恩斯塔波易亞斯坦时，她的父亲Edmond Freeman25岁，母亲Sarah Mayo22岁。她于1701年5月22日与Benjamin Higgins II在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼巴恩斯塔波易亞斯坦结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和7个女儿的父母。她去世于1743年1月21日在她的家乡享年61岁，埋葬在美国马萨诸塞州巴恩斯塔波易亞斯坦可福 波英 格洛德。

nameMeanings.name: Freeman
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Middle English freman, fremon ‘freeman, free-born man’ (Old English frēomann, frīgmann), used also occasionally as a personal name. As an African American surname it was in many cases adopted as a name denoting a man freed of slavery. See also Fryman and Free .
Irish: Anglicized (‘translated’) form of Gaelic Ó Saoraidhe (see Seery ).

variants.name: Free
meanings: English: nickname or status name from Middle English fre ‘free’ (Old English frēo), with reference to either tenurial status (‘free born’) or to character (‘noble, generous, open-handed’).
Americanized form of Swiss German and German   Frei   and   Frey  .

variants.name: Fryman
meanings: Americanized form of Swiss German Frymann or German Freimann (see Freiman ), and possibly also of the Dutch cognate Vrijman.
English: from Middle English friman ‘free-born man’ (Old English frīomann, frīgmann), symonymous with Freeman 1.

nameMeanings.name: Sarah
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the wife of Abraham and mother of Isaac. According to the Book of Genesis, she was originally called Sarai (possibly meaning ‘contentious’ in Hebrew), but had her name changed by God to the more auspicious Sarah ‘princess’ in token of a greater blessing (Genesis 17:15, ‘And God said unto Abraham, As for Sarai thy wife, thou shalt not call her name Sarai, but Sarah shall her name be’). This has been one of the most enduringly popular girls' names.

variants.name: Sara
meanings: Variant of   Sarah .  This is the form used in the Greek of the New Testament (Hebrews 11:11).

en.lifeSummary: When Sarah Freeman was born in 1682, in Eastham, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, her father, Edmond Freeman, was 25 and her mother, Sarah Mayo, was 22. She married Benjamin Higgins II on 22 May 1701, in Eastham, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 7 daughters. She died on 21 January 1743, in her hometown, at the age of 61, and was buried in Cove Burying Ground, Eastham, Barnstable, Massachusetts, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sarah Freeman est née en 1682, à Eastham, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Edmond Freeman, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Sarah Mayo, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Benjamin Higgins II le 22 mai 1701, à Eastham, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 7 filles. Elle est décédée le 21 janvier 1743, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 61 ans, et a été enterrée à Cove Burying Ground, Eastham, Barnstable, Massachusetts, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sarah Freeman 1682 in Eastham, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Edmond Freeman 25 und ihre Mutter Sarah Mayo 22. Sie hat am 22. Mai 1701 in Eastham, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America Benjamin Higgins II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Sie starb am 21. Januar 1743 im Alter von 61 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Cove Burying Ground, Eastham, Barnstable, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sarah Freeman è nata il nel 1682 nel Eastham, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, sua padre, Edmond Freeman, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Sarah Mayo, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Benjamin Higgins II il 22 maggio 1701, nel Eastham, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 7 figlie. Morì il 21 gennaio 1743, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 61 anni, e fu sepolta a Cove Burying Ground, Eastham, Barnstable, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Sarah Freemanが1682年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーバーンスタブルエアスサムで生まれた時，父Edmond Freemanは25歳，母Sarah Mayoは22歳であった。1701年5月22日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーバーンスタブルエアスサムでBenjamin Higgins IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼女は1743年1月21日に故郷で61歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州バーンスタブルエアスサムコブ ブリイング グロウンドにて埋葬された。

ko.Eastham, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay,: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 바른스타블일 이스섬
ko.Eastham, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay C: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 바른스타블일 이스섬
ko.Cove Burying Ground, Eastham, Barnstable: 미국 매사추세츠 주 바른스타블일 이스섬 커브 버이잉 그라운드
ko.Sandwich, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 바른스타블일 샌드위치
ko.Eastham, Barnstable, Plymouth Colony, Br: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 플림우스 콜론이 바른스타블일 이스섬
ko.lifeSummary: Sarah Freeman(이)가 1682년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 바른스타블일 이스섬에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Edmond Freeman(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sarah Mayo(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1701년 5월 22일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 바른스타블일 이스섬에서 Benjamin Higgins II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1743년 1월 21일 그녀의 고향에서 61세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 매사추세츠 주 바른스타블일 이스섬 커브 버이잉 그라운드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sarah Freeman nasceu em 1682, em Eastham, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, seu pai, Edmond Freeman, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Sarah Mayo, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Benjamin Higgins II em 22 de maio de 1701, em Eastham, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 7 filhas. Ela faleceu em 21 de janeiro de 1743, em sua cidade natal, com 61 anos, e foi sepultada em Cove Burying Ground, Eastham, Barnstable, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.Eastham, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay,: эастам, барнстабл, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.Eastham, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay C: эастам, барнстабл, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика

ru.Sandwich, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay: сэндвич, барнстабл, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.Eastham, Barnstable, Plymouth Colony, Br: эастам, барнстабл, плимоут колони, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sarah Freeman родилась в 1682 г. в местности эастам, барнстабл, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика, её отцу по имени Edmond Freeman было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Sarah Mayo, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Benjamin Higgins II 22 мая 1701 г. в местности эастам, барнстабл, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 7 дочерей. Она умерла 21 января 1743 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 61 год и была похоронена в местности ков буринг гроунд, эастам, барнстабл, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sarah Freeman nació en 1682, en Eastham, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, su papá, Edmond Freeman, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Sarah Mayo, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Benjamin Higgins II el 22 de mayo de 1701, en Eastham, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió el 21 de enero de 1743, en su pueblo, a la edad de 61 años, y fue sepultada en Cove Burying Ground, Eastham, Barnstable, Masachusets, Estados Unidos.
